title: Mid St. Louis County Region Overview
content:
Mid County comprises inner-ring St. Louis County suburbs with the highest concentration of wealth in the region. Historic Tudor homes, mid-century modern, and new custom estates.

Location: Central corridor just west of city limits. 15 minutes from everything — Forest Park, major hospitals, employers, shopping. Access via I-64/40 and I-70.

Featured Communities:
- Clayton: Urban downtown, upscale dining, luxury condos
- Ladue: Expansive lots, tree-lined avenues, custom homes
- Frontenac: High-end properties, interstate access
- Creve Coeur: Business/medical hub, established subdivisions
- Huntleigh: Exclusive luxury estates
- Kirkwood: Historic neighborhoods, walkable downtown

Additional: Brentwood, Glendale, Maplewood, Olivette, Oakland, Richmond Heights, Rock Hill, Shrewsbury, University City, Webster Groves. Charming small-town feel with tree-lined streets and gorgeous homes.

Real Estate: Historic renovations, teardowns, contemporary custom builds. Ladue, Frontenac, Clayton, Huntleigh among most expensive, attracting wealthy families seeking established neighborhoods with character.
